name: Climb Fling
author: Poki
description: Climb Fling is a puzzle skill game where you try to reach the top of a climbing track by flinging a character in ragdoll upward. The character will automatically grab the climbing holds it can find to not fall off the track. Will you manage to reach the last level ? How to play Climb Fling? Aim - moving the mouse cursor Shoot - Click, drag and release the left mouse button to fling the character Who created Climb Fling? Climb Fling is created by Korigame. This is their first game on Poki ! How can I play Climb Fling for free? You can play Climb Fling for free on Poki. Can I play Climb Fling on mobile devices and desktop? Climb Fling can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
